decks.notes: The main concept of this Turbo Necro combo deck is to quickly assemble the necessary cards to cast Necrodominance, allowing the player to cheat powerful creatures into play from exile. The deck utilizes cards like Beseech the Mirror and Summoner's Pact to find key pieces, while using mana acceleration from cards like Lotus Petal and Simian Spirit Guide to power out spells quickly. The deck aims to win the game by casting Tendrils of Agony or overwhelming the opponent with powerful creatures to secure victory.

The main concept of this Eldrazi Aggro deck is to quickly ramp into powerful Eldrazi creatures by utilizing cards like Eye of Ugin, Eldrazi Temple, and Lotus Petal. By using Cavern of Souls to make your Eldrazi spells uncounterable and Chalice of the Void to shut down opposing strategies, you can overwhelm your opponent with efficient threats like Thought-Knot Seer and Reality Smasher. The deck also includes removal in the form of Kozilek's Command and Glaring Fleshraker, as well as additional finishers like Sire of Seven Deaths and It That Heralds the End.

The primary focus of this deck is to establish early board control and disrupt the opponent's game plan through a combination of efficient creatures, hand disruption spells, and countermagic. Utilizing cards like Brainstorm, Force of Will, Daze, and Thoughtseize to maintain tempo advantage while applying pressure with aggressive creatures like Orcish Bowmasters and Murktide Regent. The deck aims to maintain a balance between aggression and control, using cards like Fatal Push and Snuff Out to deal with opposing threats while leveraging Tamiyo, Inquisitive Student for card advantage. Wasteland is included to disrupt the opponent's mana base and slow down their game plan.

The main focus of this deck is to quickly and efficiently fill the graveyard with powerful creatures, such as Griselbrand and Koma, World-Eater, and then bring them back into play through spells like Reanimate and Animate Dead. This combo-reanimator archetype aims to overwhelm the opponent with huge threats while disrupting their game plan with cards like Thoughtseize and Cabal Therapy. The deck is built around the synergy between different graveyard recursion spells and powerful creatures, with the goal of quickly bringing out large threats and dominating the game.

The main idea of this deck is to control the game using lands and disruptive spells, while also utilizing the combo of Dark Depths and Thespian's Stage to create a 20/20 indestructible creature. The deck focuses on mana denial with cards like Wasteland and explores the toolbox aspect of lands with cards like Crop Rotation and Expedition Map. It also includes protection with cards like Maze of Ith and Karakas, and graveyard recursion with Life from the Loam. Overall, the deck aims to outvalue and outmaneuver the opponent through clever land plays and disruption.

The main concept of this deck is to establish a powerful control over the game through a combination of artifacts and prison effects. By utilizing cards like Trinisphere, Planar Nexus, and Karn, the Great Creator, the deck aims to lock down the opponent's options while also generating powerful mana advantage with cards like Urza's Saga and Grim Monolith. The inclusion of key artifact cards like The One Ring and Candelabra of Tawnos further solidifies the deck's ability to control the pace of the game and ultimately overwhelm the opponent with powerful threats like Emrakul, the Aeons Torn and Ugin, Eye of the Storms.

This deck focuses on locking down the opponent's resources with a combination of artifacts and powerful control elements. By utilizing cards like The One Ring, Planar Nexus, and Karn, the Great Creator, the deck aims to disrupt the opponent's game plan while building towards a win condition. The inclusion of cards like Emrakul, the Aeons Torn and Ugin, Eye of the Storms provides a powerful late-game threat. The synergy between artifacts like Candelabra of Tawnos and Urza's Saga, along with control elements like Trinisphere, creates a strong prison-style strategy that aims to control the game and secure a victory.

The primary focus of this deck is to quickly and aggressively control the game, utilizing cards like Lightning Bolt, Daze, and Force of Will to disrupt the opponent's strategy while deploying threats like Dragon's Rage Channeler and Murktide Regent to apply pressure. The deck also includes a strong mana denial strategy with Wasteland and counterspells to maintain tempo. By efficiently drawing cards with Ponder, Brainstorm, and Mishra's Bauble, the deck aims to maintain card advantage and outpace the opponent in the Legacy 1 vs 1 format.

The deck revolves around filling up the graveyard with powerful creatures like Griselbrand, Archon of Cruelty, and Atraxa, Grand Unifier using cards like Faithless Looting, Thoughtseize, and Unmask, and then bringing them back onto the battlefield using Reanimate, Animate Dead, and Shallow Grave. The deck combines graveyard manipulation with efficient reanimation spells and disruption to quickly put powerful threats into play while disrupting the opponent's game plan. It aims to win the game through overwhelming board presence and card advantage generated by its powerful reanimated creatures.

The main focus of this deck is to utilize various reanimation spells and graveyard manipulation to quickly bring powerful creatures onto the battlefield, such as Archon of Cruelty and Griselbrand. The deck also includes cards like Faithless Looting and Collective Brutality to dig for combo pieces and disrupt opponents. Cabal Therapy helps to clear the way for reanimation spells while Atraxa, Grand Unifier provides additional support. The inclusion of cards like Lotus Petal and Dark Ritual allows for explosive starts, while Raucous Theater and Raph & Mikey, Troublemakers provide additional value.

The main concept of this deck is to quickly and aggressively utilize artifact creatures and artifacts to control the board and overwhelm the opponent. By combining artifact synergy with blue control elements such as Force of Will, Urza's Saga, and Emry, Lurker of the Loch, the deck aims to create a fast-paced and powerful win condition. The inclusion of cards like Mishra's Bauble and Pithing Needle adds versatility and disruption to further enhance the deck's aggro strategy.

The main concept of this deck is to establish a prison-like control over the game by utilizing a combination of artifacts and powerful utility cards. This involves locking down the opponent's options and disrupting their strategies with cards like Trinisphere and Pithing Needle, while also generating mana and value through cards such as Grim Monolith and Karn, the Great Creator. The end goal is to establish an overwhelming advantage on the battlefield and outvalue the opponent, ultimately leading to victory through resource denial and efficient threat management.

The deck focuses on utilizing artifacts to create a prison-like control strategy, locking down the opponent's resources and preventing them from enacting their game plan. With powerful cards like Karn, the Great Creator and Ugin, Eye of the Storm, along with disruptive artifacts like Trinisphere and Pithing Needle, the deck aims to control the game tempo and eventually win through powerful threats like Emrakul, the Aeons Torn. Urza's Saga serves as a versatile tool to tutor for key artifacts, while cards like The One Ring and Planar Nexus provide additional win conditions and resilience.

The main concept of this deck is to establish a strong control over the game by utilizing artifacts to create a prison-like board state. By using cards like Karn, the Great Creator, Trinisphere, and Ugin, Eye of the Storms, the deck aims to disrupt the opponent's strategy and slow down their game plan. The inclusion of powerful artifacts like Candelabra of Tawnos and Planar Nexus, along with utility cards like Manifold Key and Pithing Needle, further enhances the control and lockdown aspect of the deck. Overall, the goal is to control the game and restrict the opponent's options until victory is achieved.

The deck focuses on maintaining tempo by utilizing efficient spells like Force of Will and Lightning Bolt to disrupt the opponent while deploying threats like Dragon's Rage Channeler and Murktide Regent. With a low land count and Wastelands to disrupt opponent's mana base, the deck aims to quickly close out the game by attacking with evasive creatures. By combining disruptive interaction with aggressive threats, the deck aims to control the pace of the game and put pressure on the opponent to react.

The deck focuses on assembling a powerful win condition by using Doomsday to set up a specific sequence of cards to win the game. It utilizes cards like Dark Ritual and Lotus Petal to generate mana quickly, while also including disruption in the form of Thoughtseize and Force of Will to protect its combo. Tamiyo, Inquisitive Student and Flow State provide card selection and filtering. The deck aims to efficiently set up its win condition, often winning the game in one explosive turn.
